description: LP112 Countach LP400 chassis 1120106 detail page
raw_html:
1975 RHD Countach LP400

Chassis Number 1120106 is this Arancio car with Beige Leather interior, currently believed to be residing in Hertfordshire, UK.

It is fitted with engine number 1120106.

The vehicle appears in the following publications: Moreland Book, Dron Book.

It has the following modifications from the standard european model on offer at the time of manufacture: Restored at Portmans.

Other Information: Supplied new in the UK and retained in right-hand-drive form.

Information on this car was sourced from UK Countach Anniv. Launch / GrahamTurner.org.

The data on this specific vehicle was last updated 11-Jul-2022.
